title: `docs/architecture/apparatus/astrolabe.md` carries a stale `refines` link diagram for a mandate that no longer gets posted

decisions.question: Should the `## Writ Linking` section be deleted outright, or rewritten to describe the parent/child relationship observation-lift now produces?
decisions.rationale: #38 fires cleanly — the section duplicates content already carried by the rig narration and engine-table entries; delete beats repair for a duplicated artifact with no named external reader.
